{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Seed of Honor
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Seed of Honor]] is a bronze monument in [[Moongrave]] representing [[Malice]] founding the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Seed of Honor]] is a bronze monument of [[Malice]] pulling back a bow that resembles [[Suu]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
